metaDescription: Grok 4.20 (xAI (Grok)), released 2026-03 — part of the Grok (flagship) line. Prior flagship; beta launched Feb 17, 2026, API variants (grok-4.20-0309 reasoning…
overview: Grok 4.20 is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok (flagship) line. Released 2026-03. xAI's main general-purpose chat and reasoning model line.

What's notable in this version: Prior flagship; beta launched Feb 17, 2026, API variants (grok-4.20-0309 reasoning/non-reasoning/multi-agent) from March 10, 2026. Emphasized speed and prompt adherence; up to 2M context.
